creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Joshua, good day.

Two questions:
 - does the driver still works fine and shows no issues on your hardware?
 - you seem to be the original submitter for the port, but the maintainer from the day one (in MAINTAINER) is freebsd@intel.com.  Was that intentional?  Are folks at Intel aware that they maintain the port?  I see no maintainer reaction to the PR for the half a year, so one of the options that the MAINTAINER entry is bogus.

Thank you.
